creator: beerml@sigma6audio.de
text:
Created attachment 220551
Diff of port files

Update of ardour to v6.5.0.
Main new feature of this release would have been VST3 support.
To enable this also for FreeBSD would need some adaptions.
Probably doable. However as VST3 doesn't have any relevance for
FreeBSD for now, I didn't spend the effort and kept the new feature disabled.

Besides this the new release offers as usual many bug fixes.
